$description: Per-screen handoff spec for "Educator — start shift" (S5) in flow "xplor-hub-login". Generated by scripts/build-handoff.mjs — do not edit by hand.
name: Educator — start shift
purpose: Educator lands here after login to manage their shift: end it or resume it.
entry: From a successful login on the educator journey
exit: → S1 via End Shift or Resume Shift; back → S1
layout: Hub shell with back-link 'Dashboard'; title 'Welcome Educator'; body vertically centred
Panel (max 810px): date line · large clock · shift progress bar (6:00am → 6:00pm, ~40% elapsed)
Two action cards side by side: End Shift (danger tile) · Resume Shift (solid teal tile)

redlines.spec: 11px track (grey-300), teal fill to 40%, 15px white knob with 3px teal ring

behaviour: End Shift and Resume Shift both return to the Dashboard in the prototype — real confirmation/rota behaviour is an open question.
Date, clock and shift progress are static demo values.
a11y: The shift progress bar needs role=progressbar with aria-valuenow/min/max in build.
End Shift is a destructive action — confirm whether it needs a confirmation step on a shared kiosk.

acceptance.text: Both shift actions return to the Dashboard.
acceptance.assert: click('End Shift') -> step == dashboard; click('Resume Shift') -> step == dashboard
